positive_fixtures.description: Code permits an underscore after the first character
Code permits digits after the first character
Label permits an internal ordinary space
Label permits an internal line feed

Description permits an internal carriage return
Retired timestamp may equal created timestamp
Retired timestamp may follow created timestamp
